# Vectorized sequence parsing

:::{#tbl-cpus .large-table}
| CPU | Year | SSE | AVX2 | BMI2 | NEON |
|:----|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|:----:|
| **Intel** | | | | | |
| Xeon X5670             | 2010 | + | -- | -- | -- |
| Xeon E5-2620           | 2012 | + | -- | -- | -- |
| Xeon E7-4850 V3        | 2015 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon E5-2620 V4        | 2016 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 6130         | 2017 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 5218         | 2019 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 5318Y        | 2021 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Silver 4314       | 2021 | + | + | + | -- |
| Xeon Gold 6442Y        | 2023 | + | + | + | -- |
| Core Ultra 7 165H \*[^pc]   | 2023 | + | + | + | -- |
| **AMD** | | | | | |
| Epyc 7301                | 2017 | + | + | ~[^pdep] | -- |
| Epyc 7452                | 2019 | + | + | ~ | -- |
| Epyc 7642                | 2019 | + | + | ~ | -- |
| Epyc 7513                | 2021 | + | + | + | -- |
| Epyc 9254                | 2022 | + | + | + | -- |
| Ryzen 5 8500G \*         | 2024 | + | + | + | -- |
| **ARM** | | | | | |
| Apple M1 \*              | 2020 | -- | -- | -- | + |
| Apple M3 Pro \*          | 2023 | -- | -- | -- | + |
| Neoverse-V2              | 2023 | -- | -- | -- | + |

Instruction-set extensions supported by the benchmarked CPUs.
:::

[^pc]: (\*) personal computers, not benchmarked in a reproducible environment
[^pdep]: (~) microcoded PDEP/PEXT instructions (very slow)
